headline: Hershey's Salty Snacks Business Shows Strength Beyond LesserEvil
summary: Hershey's salty snacks sales surge in Q1, with LesserEvil boosting growth as Dot's, Reese's Filled Pretzels and snack mix gains add momentum.

raw.headline: Hershey's Salty Snacks Business Shows Strength Beyond LesserEvil
raw.summary: Hershey's salty snacks sales surge in Q1, with LesserEvil boosting growth as Dot's, Reese's Filled Pretzels and snack mix gains add momentum.

headline: The Hershey Company Names Heather Hoytink President, US
summary: The Hershey Company (NYSE: HSY) today announced that Heather Hoytink has been named President, U.S., effective July 8, 2026. Hoytink brings more than 20 years of sales, operations and commercial leadership experience, most recently as Senior Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer, U.S. Away From Home Beverages at PepsiCo.

headline: McCormick Q2 Earnings Coming Up: Essential Insights for Investors
summary: MKC heads into second-quarter earnings with revenue growth expected as pricing, innovation and category demand support sales momentum.
